T20 World Cup 2026 — Final

📅 Sun, 15 Mar 2026 · 19:00📍 Narendra Modi Stadium, Ahmedabad, India🏆 ICC T20 World Cup

Compare Ticket Prices

😔

Sold Out

All tickets for this event have sold out. Check back for any resales.

📋 Event Overview

The ICC T20 World Cup Final returns to the Narendra Modi Stadium for a fitting conclusion to the greatest short-format tournament on earth. Two nations, 20 overs each, and one chance to be crowned world champions. The final of a T20 World Cup delivers drama, nerves and pure entertainment in equal measure — and with 132,000 fans creating an atmosphere that shakes the ground, this is the ultimate cricket experience. Sold out.

Narendra Modi Stadium is one of the premier sporting venues in Ahmedabad, India, offering fans an unforgettable atmosphere. This Cricket event is part of the ICC T20 World Cup season and attracts supporters from across the country.

Tickets for T20 World Cup 2026 — Final are currently sold out. We compare prices across all major resale and official platforms so you can find the best deal without the hassle.
